title: Hyperbola declines FSF stance regarding machine learning (2024)
abstract: Hyperbola has surprisingly withdrawn from the FSF's stance on machine learning! This move leaves you wondering how the open-source community will manage without their support. But don't worry; it's all part of Hyperbola's unconventional path. With this decision, they're venturing into new territory, so expect some changes. It might be time to find your own fun!
abstract_zh: Hyperbola这次可真是让人大跌眼镜，直接宣布退出FSF的机器学习阵营了！这下可好，你得准备好应对没有Hyperbola支持的开源社区了。不过别担心，这就像Hyperbola自己说的，“不走寻常路”。这次他们干脆把脚从泥潭里拔出来，转而探索新的方向，看来以后咱们得自己找乐子了！哈哈。
